results.title: Kylian Mbappé scores again and France reaches World Cup quarterfinals with 1-0 win over Paraguay
results.description: Kylian Mbappé laughed and smiled — and scored, of course — when Paraguay tried to bait him and his French teammates into fouls and provoke fights, as hot heads became a recurring theme during one of the steamiest World Cup games on record.

results.title: Boks off to a solid start in Nations Championship
results.description: This may be a brand-new tournament with a fresh format, but these were the same ol’ conquering Boks.

results.title: Osaka Targets Sabalenka Revenge In Wimbledon Last 16
results.description: Naomi Osaka will seek revenge against world number one Aryna Sabalenka in a blockbuster Wimbledon last-16 showdown on Sunday. Sabalenka holds an active head-to-head advantage, having defeated the Japanese star in three consecutive meetings earlier in the year. results.title: Tiger-Cats look to beat Bombers for 2nd time this season
results.description: The Hamilton Tiger-Cats will look to defeat the Winnipeg Blue Bombers for the second time on the young season when the teams square off Sunday night i
